notes: Thin infrastructure file (84 lines, 10 declarations) providing base change of SmoothPlaneCurve and L-rational points; all proofs are rfl or single-step structure constructions. The sole non-trivial proof is includePoint, which invokes WeierstrassCurve.Affine.map_nonsingular and FaithfulSMul.algebraMap_injective. baseChange is the primary export consumed heavily across IsogenyBaseChange.lean, GaloisAction.lean, OrdAtInftyBaseChange.lean, and many WeilPairing files.
